title: GREECE enforcement action against Thessaloniki–Thessaly Gas Supply Company S.A. (10,000)
summary: Insufficient data processing agreement The Greek DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 10,000 on Thessaloniki–Thessaly Gas Supply Company S.A. The controller, an energy provider, used external processors for direct marketing via telephone. The controller forwarded complaints by data subjects to the external processors, but failed to ensure, that...
